templates.name: Do you provide gift receipts?
templates.content: Don't worry, the packing slip included in your shipment does not show the prices of our products

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $49. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy and start your return here: https://www.loccitane.com/en-us/pages?fdid=ReturnAndExchange

templates.name: Can I exchange a gift?
templates.content: If you wish to exchange a gift, please visit our L'Occitane boutiques to complete this request (along with your invoice/gift receipt). At this time we are unable to exchange gift returns at our distribution center.

templates.name: Referral
templates.content: We are glad to hear that you want to share the world of L'Occitane with your friend! In order for you to receive your promotional code, your friend must be a first time registered customer placing an order of $70+. You will receive a promotional code afterwards. Please make sure that you are logged into your account at the time of checkout or your promo code will not work.

templates.name: Are your products vegan?
templates.content: We do not use any ingredients of animal origin except for the bi-product of bees such as honey or beeswax.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly through this link https://help.loccitane.com/selfloccitane/webanoenus/en-us/contact?templateId=&groupId= Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-888-623-2880 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Where is my refund?
templates.content: When paying with a credit/debit card, please allow 3-7 business days for your refund to reach your bank account/credit cardt. Amazon Pay refunds should reflect back into your account within 24 hours. PayPal refunds can take up to 30 days.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us directly through this link https://www.loccitane.com/en-us/pages?fdid=HelpAndContact or give us a call at 1-888-623-2880 Monday - Friday: 9AM-11PM EST Saturday 10AM-11PM EST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All of our products have been made in the same factory in Manosque, France since 1981.

templates.name: Where is my order shipped from?
templates.content: All orders are shipped from our warehouse in Cranbury, NJ.

templates.name: How can I redeem my L'Occitane gift card?
templates.content: You may redeem your gift card at the Payment portion of checkout. At checkout you will be asked for your gift card's PIN number. If you are still unable to redeem your gift card, please call our Customer Care Team at 1-888-623-2880.

templates.name: Do you offer any birthday rewards?
templates.content: We love birthdays! When creating your account, make sure to enter your birthday so that you will receive your special gift from Provence with a $50 purchase.

templates.name: Do you provide free shipping for orders going to Alaska, Hawaii, or Puerto Rico?
templates.content: All orders to these states have a shipping charge of $17.99. We do not offer free shipping at any time for these states.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.loccitane.com/en-us/login?original=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.loccitane.com%2Fen-us%2Faccount%2Fsummary

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / Affiliate
templates.content:
Thank you for your interest! For information relating to charity partnerships or sponsorships, influencer partnership requests, and other PR opportunities, please send an email to our public relations department at PR@us.loccitane.com. A representative of our public relations team will respond to your inquiry shortly!

As for our affiliate program, you can find more info and sign up here https://signup.cj.com/member/signup/publisher/?cid=4571499#/branded?_k=2pv9zr

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, FedEx, or DHL. Once shipped it will take 3-10 business days domestically. We also have an expedited shipping option available.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/loccitane and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/loccitaneusa

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us directly through this link https://www.loccitane.com/en-us/pages?fdid=HelpAndContact or give us a call at 1-888-623-2880 Monday - Friday: 9AM-11PM EST Saturday 10AM-11PM EST. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: What payment methods do you accept?
templates.content: Our website accepts payment from all major cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover), Apple Pay, PayPal, Amazon Pay, JCB, UnionPay, Klarna and Diners Club International. If placing an order by phone, we can only accept major credit/debit cards. We cannot use Apple PayPal, Klarna or Amazon Pay via phone. We cannot place orders through email. For your security, please do not email us your credit card information.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.loccitane.com/en-us/special-offers

templates.name: Retroactive discount request
templates.content: If you would like to apply a promotional code to an order after it has been placed, please give our customer service team a call as soon as possible at 1-888-623-2880.

templates.name: Can I return my online order at my local boutique?
templates.content: Yes. All of our boutiques can accept online returns.

templates.name: Does my order require a signature to be delivered?
templates.content: Orders with a total of $250 or more, have an automatic signature requirement to ensure secure delivery. If you would like the signature requirement removed, you may contact us within one hour of order placement (during Customer Care business hours).

templates.name: Do you ship to any U.S. Territories aside from Puerto Rico?
templates.content: Yes! We ship to the following U.S. Territories: American Samoa, Federated States of Micronesia, Guam, Marshall Islands, Northern Mariana islands, Palau, and the Virgins Islands. Standard shipping to these territories is $5.95. However, we do not have the option to place these orders online at this time, but are happy to do so over the phone at 1-888-623-2880.

templates.name: Can my order be gift wrapped?
templates.content: Our gift-wrapping program is currently on pause. We do offer a gift-wrapping kit option at checkout for an additional $5. The purpose of this kit is to assemble a gift yourself and give it to the recipient. Please be advised that if you are sending the order directly to the recipient and you select this option, they will receive an unfolded, flat box with tissue paper.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.loccitane.com/en-us/boutique-locator
